claim: Context7 is an MCP server providing RAG access to 1,856+ frameworks/tools (Next.js, Supabase, Pantic, MongoDB, etc.) with curated, example-heavy documentation. It outperforms Cursor's native custom docs.
actionable: Install Context7 MCP in Windsurf/Cursor to get instant RAG over almost 2000 framework docs. Use it before falling back to web search in your agent workflows.
source_title: This MCP Server for AI Coding Assistants Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: Context7 documentation is structured as curated snippets with examples, not monolithic docs. This improves LLM parsing and makes agents reliably code with specific frameworks.
actionable: When building RAG for coding, structure docs as small curated snippets with working examples, not large documentation files.
source_title: This MCP Server for AI Coding Assistants Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: Context7's MCP server exposes two tools: resolve_library_id (search for exact doc ID by keyword) and get_library_docs (perform RAG with variable token count). Agents can reason about how many tokens to fetch per query.
actionable: When using Context7, set global rules to control token fetch strategy: start with 5K tokens, increase to 20K if needed. Let the agent adjust based on query complexity.
source_title: This MCP Server for AI Coding Assistants Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: AI coding assistants hallucinate most when working with specific frameworks/tools because they lack up-to-date docs. MCP servers like Context7 provide just-in-time RAG to fix this.
actionable: Combat AI coding hallucinations by attaching Context7 or similar RAG MCP servers to your IDE. Refresh documentation regularly to stay current.
source_title: This MCP Server for AI Coding Assistants Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: Context7 can be integrated into any AI IDE (Windsurf, Cursor, Cline, Roo Code) via a single JSON config in mcp_config.json.
actionable: Copy the Context7 MCP config from GitHub and paste into your IDE's mcp_config.json. Refresh and you'll see two new tools available in your agent.
source_title: This MCP Server for AI Coding Assistants Will 10x Your Productivity

claim: Context7's documentation is kept up-to-date continuously and can be refreshed on-demand, ensuring agents always have current API specs and examples.
actionable: When using Context7, refresh documentation regularly (especially for frequently-updating frameworks like Next.js) to keep your agent's knowledge current.
source_title: This MCP Server for AI Coding Assistants Will 10x Your Productivity
